sizing_rule.note: Fixed maximum dollar risk per trade of $1,000 (1R concept). Position limited to 1 contract maximum. Exclude instruments where typical stop-loss distance × contract multiplier exceeds $1,000 threshold (e.g., S&P, DM, Yen, Coffee).

source_rule_text: A trader should restrict position size to avoid exceeding a fixed maximum dollar risk per trade, and should avoid instruments where typical risk exposure would breach that threshold.
